name: Katanga Mining Limited
description: Katanga Mining Limited was a mining company that operated the Kamoto Copper Company (KCC) in the Democratic Republic of the Congo. The company focused on the production of copper and cobalt through its open-pit and underground mining operations, as well as its processing facilities. In 2020, Katanga Mining completed an amalgamation transaction with Glencore, effectively becoming a subsidiary within the Glencore group, which continues to operate the KCC assets today.
